title: Integrations- Getting the most of out of your monday.com account and using Make.com

posts.author: fifield21 (Carrie )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Thought I would share this really informative webinar that is getting hosted by AXANEXA. They are gold partners, and the team over there is crazy helpful!

Also they have a blog on this topic as well: When Recipes just don't Solve the Problem - Axanexa

Here is the registration link: Meeting Registration - Zoom

Hope to see you in attendance
